suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify in `mission-core-worker` that for cross-layer Mission recovery/watcher work, limited helper extraction or continuation from an interrupted baseline may precede the first focused failing test, and workers must record any such deviation accurately in `skillFeedback` instead of marking the procedure fully followed.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both completed mission-sync-recovery feature reviews reported the same procedural mismatch: the watcher feature transcript showed implementation edits before the first failing-state test run while its handoff still marked `followedProcedure: true`, and the restore/reconciliation feature handoff explicitly recorded the same red-first tension for cross-layer helper extraction before targeted tests were practical.
